pages.text: Custom villagers placed by hand around the world. They sell mod content whose normal recipes have been removed.$(br2)Traders are invulnerable, anchored in place, never run out of stock, never go on sale, and cap at 35 trades each. Each trader has a tight theme — Wizard sells Wizards gear, Bishop sells holy plate, Engineer sells aircraft parts.$(br2)Traders are the cross-class shortcut: items your class cannot craft are buyable at the matching trader for $(l:traders/runes)runes$(/l).
